title: Title eng
action_title: Proudly made in Ukraine CBD jellies
action_description: If you're looking for a calming solution to everyday stress or to deal with the effects of PTSD, we have just what you need. We present to you our CBD jellies, pride and the best product from Ukraine! What makes them special? In addition to their unsurpassed taste and soothing properties, they are offered at a price that is significantly lower than the cost of products from foreign competitors. Get rid of anxiety and stress, feeling lightness and harmony with our CBD jelly.
feature_no_sugar_description: a type of jelly that is made without the addition of extra sugars during its manufacturing process. This feature is particularly appealing to health-conscious consumers who are looking to reduce their sugar intake. These jellies rely on the natural sweetness of the fruits used in their making, or they may use alternative sweeteners that are lower in calories compared to regular sugar. This approach helps in offering a healthier option while still delivering the enjoyable, fruity taste that jelly lovers expect. It's an ideal choice for those managing diabetes, following a weight-loss diet, or simply seeking a healthier lifestyle without compromising on taste.
feature_vegan_description: At the heart of our vegan jelly is the use of pectin, a natural and plant-derived gelling agent, which replaces traditional gelatin, an animal-based product. This ensures that our jelly is 100% animal product-free and suitable for vegan diets. Pectin not only caters to vegan needs but also maintains the jelly's smooth, lush texture, making it indistinguishable from its non-vegan counterparts in terms of quality and enjoyment.
feature_no_restricted_description: Safety and compliance are at the forefront of our production process. We ensure that every batch of our jelly is rigorously tested to confirm the purity and concentration of CBD, guaranteeing a product that is not only legal but also consistent in quality.
feature_effective_dosage_description: Our decision to double the CBD content means that each serving packs a more powerful punch, aiming to deliver noticeable results in terms of stress reduction and anxiety relief. This higher dosage is particularly beneficial for those who have found standard doses less effective or are seeking a more substantial impact from their CBD intake.
feature_made_in_Ukraine_description: Our belief is strong: Ukraine has the potential to become a key player in the global market for CBD products. By manufacturing our jelly in Ukraine, we aim to tap into this potential and contribute to the country's leap in this burgeoning industry. This move is more than a business decision; it's a statement of confidence in the resilience and capabilities of the Ukrainian people and their economy.
all_products_title: CBD Gummies made in Ukraine for ukrainians
all_products_description: Our products are made from high-quality ingredients of Western origin. This gives it the opportunity to compete and be at the level of products from the USA and Europe, while having a fair lower price than Western analogues and a higher dose of the active ingredient cannabidiol.
subscribe_title: Useful information about CBD in Ukraine and the world
subscribe_description: By subscribing to the newsletter, you will receive useful information, short- and longreads that will allow you to learn more about the use of CBD in the world, its growing popularity and benefits.
footer_description: Balance Botanica is one of the first companies in Ukraine that produces products containing cannabidiol (CBD) in its composition. Founded in 2023. The production of products containing CBD meets the growing demand in society. Production in Ukraine allows us to offer people high-quality products that can compete with Western counterparts at a much lower price.
offert_page_1: FOR ORDERING, PURCHASE, SALE AND DELIVERY OF GOODS
offert_page_2: This contract between FOP Serhiy Serhiyevich Vedmedev, hereinafter referred to as the “Seller” and the user of the services of the balancebotanica.com.ua website, hereinafter referred to as the “Customer, the Buyer”, is a contract of authorization for the order, purchase and delivery of Goods and defines the basic terms of the order, purchase and delivery of goods through the website balancebotanica.com.ua. The buyer, acting for the purpose of purchasing the Goods, accepts the terms of this contract of sale of goods (hereinafter referred to as the Contract) on the following terms.
offert_page_3: 1.1. Public offer (hereinafter referred to as the "Offer") is a public offer of the Seller, addressed to an unspecified number of persons, to enter into a contract for the sale of goods remotely with the Seller (hereinafter referred to as the "Agreement") on the terms and conditions contained in this Offer, including all Appendices.
offert_page_4: 1.2. Order - the Customer's decision to order goods and their delivery, made through the balancebotanica.com.ua website and/or an order for the purchase and delivery of goods.
offert_page_6: 2.1. The following information is an official proposal (offer) of the balancebotanica.com.ua website to any natural person (hereinafter referred to as the Buyer) to conclude a contract for the sale of goods. This contract is public, that is, in accordance with Article 633 of the Civil Code of Ukraine, its conditions are the same for all buyers.
offert_page_7: 2.2. According to Article 642 of the Civil Code of Ukraine, full and unconditional acceptance of the terms of this offer (offer), which confirms the conclusion of the Agreement for the sale of goods on the terms proposed below, is the fact of execution and confirmation of the order.
offert_page_8: 2.3. By completing the Order, the Buyer confirms agreement and unconditional acceptance of the terms of this proposal (offer).
offert_page_9: 2.4. By entering into a Contract (i.e. accepting the terms of the actual Offer (Offered Opportunities) by signing
offert_page_10: Order, the Buyer confirms the following:
offert_page_11: a) The buyer is fully and completely acquainted with and agrees with the terms of this offer (offer);
offert_page_12: b) The buyer gives permission for the collection, processing and transfer of personal data under the conditions specified below in the Clause on the collection, processing and transfer of personal data. The permission to process personal data is valid for the entire term of the Agreement, as well as for an unlimited period after its expiration.
offert_page_13: In addition, by concluding the Agreement, the Customer confirms that he has been notified (without additional notification) of the rights established by the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Personal Data", the purposes of data collection, as well as the fact that his personal data is transferred to the Seller for the purpose of being able to fulfill the conditions of this Agreement, the possibility of mutual settlements, as well as to receive invoices, acts and other documents. The Customer also agrees that the Seller has the right to provide access and transfer his personal data to third parties without any additional notifications from the Customer, without changing the purpose of personal data processing. The extent of the Customer's rights as a subject of personal data in accordance with the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Personal Data" is known and understood by him.
offert_page_15: 3.1. The price for each item of the Product is indicated on the website balancebotanica.com.ua
offert_page_16: 3.2. The Seller has the right to unilaterally change the price of any item of the Product.
offert_page_17: 3.3. In the event of a price change for the ordered Product, the Seller undertakes to inform the Buyer about the change in the price of the Product.
offert_page_18: 3.4. The Buyer has the right to confirm or cancel the Order for the purchase of the Goods, if the price has been changed by the Seller after placing the Order.
offert_page_19: 3.5. The Seller cannot change the price of the Goods paid by the Buyer.
offert_page_20: 3.6. The price and terms of delivery of the Goods are set by the relevant logistics company.
offert_page_21: The Seller can indicate the approximate cost of delivery of the Goods on the balancebotanica.com.ua website or notify the Buyer when placing the order by the Operator, but the final cost of delivery is determined by the logistics company independently, depending on the delivery conditions and tariffs.
offert_page_22: 3.7. The Buyer's obligations to pay for the Goods are considered fulfilled from the moment the funds are received by the Seller.
offert_page_23: 3.8. Settlements between the Seller and the Buyer for the Goods are made by the methods specified on the website balancebotanica.com.ua in the "PAYMENT AND DELIVERY" section.
offert_page_25: 4.1. The Order of the Product is made by the Buyer through the Operator by phone: 096-035-34-35 or through the service of the Internet site balancebotanica.com.ua
offert_page_26: 4.2. When registering on the balancebotanica.com.ua website, the Buyer undertakes to provide the following registration information:
offert_page_27: 4.2.1. surname, first name, patronymic of the Buyer or the person indicated by him (recipient);
offert_page_28: 4.2.2. the address to which the Goods should be delivered (if delivery to the Buyer's address) or the address of the delivery point of the logistics company;
offert_page_30: 4.3. the name, quantity, article number, price, total cost of the Goods selected by the Buyer are specified in the Buyer's order on the balancebotanica.com.ua website
offert_page_31: 4.4. If the Seller needs additional information, he has the right to request it from the Buyer. If the Buyer does not provide the necessary information, the Seller is not responsible for the quality of services provided to the Buyer when purchasing goods through the balancebotanica.com.ua website
offert_page_32: 4.5. When placing an Order through the Operator (clause 4.1. of this Offer), the Buyer undertakes to provide the information specified in clause 4.2. of this Offer.
offert_page_33: 4.6. The Buyer accepts the terms of this Offer by entering the relevant data into the registration form on the balancebotanica.com.ua website when placing an Order through the Operator. After placing the Order through the Operator, data about the Buyer are registered in the Seller's database.
offert_page_34: 4.7. The buyer is responsible for the reliability and accuracy of the information provided when placing the Order.
offert_page_35: 4.8. The remote sales contract between the Seller and the Buyer is considered to be concluded from the moment the order is placed electronically on the website www.balancebotanica.com.ua, or the Buyer receives the corresponding receipt from the payment system/bank, or another document confirming payment for the Goods.
offert_page_36: DELIVERY AND HANDOVER OF GOODS TO THE BUYER
offert_page_37: 5.1. The methods of delivery and payment of goods are indicated on the balancebotanica.com.ua website in the "SHIPPING AND PAYMENT" section. The order and conditions of delivery and payment of the ordered goods are agreed by the Buyer with the operator of the Internet site when placing the order.
offert_page_38: 5.2. The right of ownership and the risk of accidental loss or damage to the goods is transferred to the Customer or his representative from the moment of receipt of the goods by signing the goods receipt and / or order upon delivery / receipt of the Goods by the Customer.
offert_page_39: 5.3. The delivery of the goods is organized by the Seller's own forces in accordance with the terms of delivery, or with the involvement of third parties (delivery by a logistics company).
offert_page_40: The seller independently determines the logistics company or the list of logistics companies with which he cooperates on the delivery of the Goods.
offert_page_41: 5.4. When receiving the goods, the Customer must check the conformity of the Goods with the qualitative and quantitative characteristics (product name, quantity, completeness, expiration date) in the presence of the Seller's representative - the courier (during courier / address delivery) or the representative of the logistics company.
offert_page_42: 5.5. The Customer or the Customer's Representative, upon receiving the goods, confirms with his signature on the goods receipt and/or the order for the delivery of goods that he has no complaints about the quantity of the goods, appearance and completeness of the goods.
offert_page_44: 6.1. The exchange and return of the Goods is carried out in accordance with the requirements defined by the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Consumer Rights", Resolution of the Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine dated March 19, 1994 No. 172 "On the Implementation of Certain Provisions of the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Consumer Rights".
offert_page_45: 6.2. The customer has the right to refuse the goods at any time before their transfer, and after the transfer of the goods - in the manner and under the conditions specified by the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Consumer Rights".
offert_page_46: The return of goods is carried out taking into account the restrictions and the list of goods of appropriate quality that are not subject to exchange-return, established by Appendix No. 3 of the Resolution of the Cabinet of Ministers of Ukraine dated March 19, 1994 N 172 On the implementation of certain provisions of the Law of Ukraine "On the Protection of Consumer Rights", namely :
offert_page_47: LIST of good quality goods that cannot be exchanged (returned)
offert_page_48: 6.3. The return of the product of proper quality is possible if its appearance, consumer properties, as well as a document confirming the fact of payment and the terms of ordering the specified product are preserved.
offert_page_49: 6.4. The Customer does not have the right to refuse a product of appropriate quality that has individually defined properties, if the specified product can be used exclusively by the Consumer who purchased it, and/or was manufactured to an individual order (including non-standard ones, at the request of the Customer , dimensions, etc.). The confirmation that the product has individually defined properties is the difference in product sizes and other characteristics indicated on the website balancebotanica.com.ua.
offert_page_50: 6.5. The return of goods, in the cases provided for by law and this Agreement, is carried out at the address specified in this Agreement and at the contacts on the website balancebotanica.com.ua in the "CONTACTS" section.
offert_page_52: 7.1. The Seller is not responsible for damage caused to the Buyer as a result of improper use of Goods pre-ordered through the balancebotanica.com.ua website and purchased from the Seller.
offert_page_53: 7.2. The Seller is not responsible for improper, untimely fulfillment of Orders and its obligations in case the Buyer provides unreliable, incomplete or erroneous information.
offert_page_54: 7.3. The Seller and the Buyer are responsible for fulfilling their obligations in accordance with the current legislation of Ukraine and the provisions of this Agreement.
offert_page_55: 7.4. The Seller or the Buyer is released from responsibility for full or partial non-fulfillment of their obligations, if the non-fulfillment is the result of force majeure circumstances such as: war or hostilities, earthquake, flood, fire and other natural disasters, quarantine restrictions, decisions of state authorities that arose regardless of the will of the Seller and / or the Buyer after the conclusion of this contract. A Party that cannot fulfill its obligations shall immediately notify the other Party thereof.
